200.$description: Brand light — selected rows, info fills

0.$description: Pure white surface — base canvas, raised surfaces

50.$description: Subtle surface — off-white fills, alt rows

150.$description: Cool light neutral — subtle fills, disabled, hover on white

600.$description: Accent — borders, icons, indicators (ADA AA on white)

main.$description: DEPRECATED — use accent (600). Retained for back-compat.

600.$description: Accent — borders, icons, indicators (ADA AA on white)

main.$description: DEPRECATED — use accent (600). Retained for back-compat.

600.$description: Accent — borders, icons, indicators (ADA AA on white)

main.$description: DEPRECATED — use accent (600). Retained for back-compat.

50.$description: Accent tint — promo surfaces, warm page backgrounds

100.$description: Accent lightest — hover fills, subtle warm highlights

200.$description: Accent light — badge fills, selected states, featured backgrounds

500.$description: Accent base — interactive accent (text/badge/border only; NEVER a button background)

600.$description: Accent — badges, featured borders, urgency indicators. NEVER a button background.

800.$description: Accent dark — hover/pressed states on accent elements

900.$description: Accent darkest — text on warm surfaces, headings in warm contexts

tertiary.$description: Remapped to gray/600 in 1.2 for contrast

accent.$description: Secondary CTA, registration, urgency — text/badge/border only, never a button background

destructive.$description: Destructive action color (fixed broken ref in 1.2)

header-bg.$description: Header background — stays dark in both themes

footer-bg.$description: Footer background — stays dark in both themes

primitive-dark.$description: Dark mode primitive color ramps — same hue families with adjusted lightness for dark surfaces. Tints (50-200) become dark backgrounds; core values (600-900) become lighter for contrast.

50.$description: Brand tint — subtle blue-tinted dark backgrounds

100.$description: Brand lightest — info backgrounds, hover fills

200.$description: Brand light — selected rows, active backgrounds

600.$description: Brand primary — CTAs, active links (5.8:1 on #1A1D23)

800.$description: Brand hover — hover states, high emphasis

900.$description: Brand text — titles, critical text on dark surfaces

50.$description: Accent tint — warm dark page backgrounds

200.$description: Accent light — badge fills, featured backgrounds

600.$description: Accent — badges, featured borders. NEVER a button background.

900.$description: Accent text — text on dark warm surfaces

0.$description: Pure white surface (dark) — base dark canvas

150.$description: INTERIM — Figma exports gray/150 mode-flat (#ECEEF2); derived dark step between 100 and 200, pending design confirmation

dark.$description: Dark mode semantic tokens — reference primitive-dark values

overlay.$description: Modal/drawer backdrop — ink at ~45% (aligned to surface/scrim)

accent.$description: Orange accent lightened for dark backgrounds (4.1:1 on #1A1D23)

accent-surface.$description: Warm tinted surface for dark mode badges/features

primary.$value: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

monospace.$description: Compare contexts only. Always pair with font-feature-settings: "zero" 0 to suppress dotted zero.

0-5.$description: Component-internal only — hairline gaps, badge y-padding. Never layout.

1-5.$description: Component-internal only — chip/badge x-padding, tight icon gaps. Never layout.

3.$description: Form field padding-x, small card padding

spring.$description: Delight animations — overshoot for heart pop, bid pulse

delight.$description: Delight animation specifications for key user moments

watchlist-heart.$description: Heart pop spring on watchlist add

check-path.$description: SVG checkmark draw (250ms delay after circle)

platform.$description: Platform-specific overrides. Desktop tokens are the defaults above. Mobile tokens below are the complete mobile/app layer — use these for iOS, Android, and mobile web.

comfortable.$description: Preferred touch target for primary actions

spacing.$description: Minimum gap between adjacent touch targets

sm.$description: Small button — secondary actions in toolbars

border-radius.$description: Bottom sheet style — rounded top only

spacing.$description: Mobile spacing adjustments — tighter to preserve screen real estate

typography.$description: Mobile type scale — adjusted for readability at arm's length

large-title.$description: iOS Large Title — top of scrollable views

body.$description: Default mobile body — 17px per iOS HIG

borderRadius.$description: Mobile radii — slightly larger for softer feel on small screens

motion.$description: Mobile motion — slightly faster for responsive feel, iOS spring curves

items-max.$description: Maximum items in bottom tab bar

action-min.$description: Min touch target for nav bar actions

gestures.$description: Gesture thresholds for native/web app interactions

swipe-dismiss.$description: Vertical distance to dismiss bottom sheet

swipe-action.$description: Horizontal swipe for delete/archive in lists
